# Project Structure

This is a simple Node.js project with Express for handling HTTP requests. The project includes modules for projects, tasks, members, and comments.

## Directory Structure

```
src/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app.js
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ server.js
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ lib/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ errors.js
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ id.js
в””в”Ђв”Ђ modules/
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ projects/
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ routes.js
    в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ service.js
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ tasks/
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ routes.js
    в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ service.js
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ members/
    в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ routes.js
    в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ service.js
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ comments/
        в”њв”Ђв”Ђ routes.js
        в””в”Ђв”Ђ service.js
```

notes: Fixed the syntax issue in src/modules/tasks/routes.js by closing the string and adding the missing part of the status validation message.
